Flap Team","details":"v2 Spec:   - max supply: 1 Billion tokens   - The constant product equation is :         (1e9 + h  - s) * (eth + r) = k      - s is the current circulating supply of the token      - eth is the current eth reserve      - special case: When h = 0, k = r * 1e9   - estimateSupply(estimate s given eth): s = 1e9 + h - k/(r + eth)   - estimateReserve(estimate eth given s): eth =  k/(h + 1e9 - s) - r   - price estimation:  k/(h + 1e9 - s)**2","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"constant product bonding curve","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"ReserveExceedsMaxReserve(uint256)":[{"notice":"error if reserve is greater than the max reserve"}],"SupplyExceedsTotalSupply(uint256)":[{"notice":"error if the new supply is greater than the total
